Morris Enterprise

Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3304-07-22
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering Riri McAllister being unmasked as Nexus and framing Admiral Varma, the hunt for League strongholds in Zibal and Ienpalang, Aisling Duval's interview with Solomon Helios, violence against the Far God cult, discovery of a WWIII nuclear missile in the Pacific, and Cobra Wing's successful Ebor outpost campaign.
3304-07-20
Cobra Wing Campaign Concludes
Cobra Wing announces its Ebor research outpost campaign was enthusiastically received. Scores of pilots delivered commodities to Morris Enterprise and eliminated agitators. The outpost will support research into Thargoid communication with the goal of achieving peace.
3304-07-15
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering Admiral Varma's arrest, the Church of Eternal Void declaring war on the Far God cult, Aisling Duval's wedding date announcement, the search for a billion-credit lottery winner, Cobra Wing's Ebor research outpost initiative, and the Didiomanja Emperor's Grace Academy campaign conclusion.
3304-07-13
Ebor Research Outpost
Cobra Wing launches an initiative to build a new research outpost in the Ebor system focused on Thargoid inter-species communication research. They place an open order for commodities and a kill order on wanted ships to protect traders delivering to Morris Enterprise.
